description:
Calculate the Cardiothoracic Ratio (CTR) from the axial CT slice loaded in Weasis by measuring the maximum transverse Cardiac Diameter and the maximum internal Thoracic Diameter. Save a text report to ~/DICOM/exports/ctr_report.txt with exactly three lines:
Cardiac Diameter: <value> mm
Thoracic Diameter: <value> mm
Cardiothoracic Ratio: <value>
Save a screenshot showing the measurements to ~/DICOM/exports/ctr_measurements.png.
